description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, complemented by large glass doors and windows framed in dark material, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front facade features two wide glass double doors, likely serving as the main entry points, and is flanked by a paved patio area. There are several large posters or signs mounted on the exterior walls, suggesting either a commercial or mixed-use function. Two decorative potted plants are placed near the entrance, enhancing the curb appeal. The house sits on a paved surface, with clean lines and a simple, functional design.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass doors and windows, and a paved patio with potted plants.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large glass double doors, three wall-mounted posters, and two potted plants on a paved patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass doors and windows, with one door open and the potted plants visible at the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain white wall with no windows or doors, and a glimpse of the paved area.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the glass doors and windows, with the potted plants further away and the patio extending outward.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and glass doors in symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with dark frames, flush with the facade, opening onto a paved patio with potted plants and no steps or overhang.
